Bash(curl -sL "https://www.petrichortech.com/" 2>/dev/null | python3 -c "
import sys, re
html = sys.stdin.read\(\)
# Find all inline SVG blocks
svgs = re.findall\(r'<svg[\\s\\S]*?</svg>', html, re.IGNORECASE\)
for i, s in enumerate\(svgs[:10]\):
    print\(f'--- SVG {i+1} \(len={len\(s\)}\) ---'\)
    print\(s[:300]\)
    print\(\)
")

Bash(curl -sL "https://www.petrichortech.com/" 2>/dev/null | python3 -c "
import sys, re
html = sys.stdin.read\(\)
# Find all inline SVG blocks
svgs = re.findall\(r'<svg[\\s\\S]*?</svg>', html, re.IGNORECASE\)
print\(f'Total SVGs found: {len\(svgs\)}'\)
for i, s in enumerate\(svgs\):
    print\(f'SVG {i+1}: len={len\(s\)}, preview={s[:100].replace\(chr\(10\), \\" \\"\)}'\)
")

Bash(curl -sL "https://www.petrichortech.com/" 2>/dev/null | python3 -c "
import sys, re
html = sys.stdin.read\(\)
# Look for context around logo-related content
# Check for 'logo' in IDs, classes, aria-labels
logo_ctx = re.findall\(r'.{0,200}logo.{0,200}', html, re.IGNORECASE\)
for c in logo_ctx[:5]:
    print\(repr\(c[:300]\)\)
    print\(\)
")
